title: earendil-works/pi
friendlyTitle: Pi is an open toolkit for building coding agents
summary: Pi is a TypeScript monorepo for an AI agent toolkit, including a unified multi-provider LLM API, agent runtime, terminal UI components, and an interactive coding-agent CLI. The project has active releases and positions itself as a self-extensible coding agent harness.
friendlySummary: Pi provides pieces for agent tools, including an LLM API layer, agent runtime, terminal interface, and coding-agent CLI.
whyItMatters: Builders can study or reuse its agent loop, provider abstraction, TUI, and coding-agent patterns when experimenting with their own agent tools. It is also a useful comparison point for teams evaluating open coding-agent infrastructure.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Developers can learn from it or use parts of it when building their own AI agent workflows.
